title: Setting Up Outlook on a New Device
text:
Q: How do I set up Outlook or my email client on a new device?
A: Windows: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Start menu. Step 2 - If prompted, select 'Add Account'. If not, go to File > Account Settings > Account Settings > New. Step 3 - Choose 'Email Account' and click 'Next'. Step 4 - Enter your name, email address, and password, then click 'Next'. Step 5 - Outlook will test the account settings; once completed, click 'Finish'. macOS: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Applications folder. Step 2 - If prompted, select 'Add Account'. If not, go to Tools > Accounts > + > Exchange or Other. Step 3 - Enter your email address and password, then click 'Add Account'. Step 4 - Follow any additional prompts to configure your account settings. Step 5 - Once setup is complete, your email should start syncing. Note: Ensure you have your email credentials handy, and if you encounter issues, contact IT support.
